behavior_summary: Provides the behavior for the lamp object's 'U8P_EWLAMPTP::look' (inspect) interaction.
When the player inspects the lamp, the script displays a single short bark text: "lamp ".
Immediately after showing the bark the process suspends/ends; there are no branches, menus, or external calls.
No global flags are read or written by this script.
notable_control_flow: U8P_EWLAMPTP::look is executed as a process (processType 0x0208) and flows straight to a single Bark node that displays "lamp ".
After the Bark node the process issues a suspend/terminate action, so the U8P_EWLAMPTP::look interaction yields control back to the engine immediately.
open_questions: The bark text contains a trailing space ("lamp "). Is that intentional formatting (e.g., concatenation elsewhere) or an artifact?

Is the process invoked only by an explicit 'U8P_EWLAMPTP::look' action, or can engine fast-area entry (enterFastArea) also trigger this handler in some contexts? (inference: standard 'U8P_EWLAMPTP::look' handler)

main_function.name: U8P_EWLAMPTP::look
main_function.purpose: Show the lamp object's short description when the player inspects it, then suspend/terminate the U8P_EWLAMPTP::look process.
entry_conditions: Triggered when the player uses the game's 'U8P_EWLAMPTP::look' (examine/inspect) action on this lamp object (inferred from classification as a U8P_EWLAMPTP::look process).

function_map.name: U8P_EWLAMPTP::look
function_map.role: U8P_EWLAMPTP::look/inspect handler for the lamp object; displays a one-line description and ends the process.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the behavior for the lamp object's 'U8P_EWLAMPTP::look' (inspect) interaction.
